pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-011 (Data Quality) scores 0.434 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Warehouse Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.434 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality KSA DQ-T-011 as a discrete competency for Data Warehouse Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Data Warehouse Architect market data. Data quality content is operational/monitoring, not warehouse design. Score 0.434 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Data quality content is operational/monitoring, not warehouse design. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: Data quality content is operational/monitoring, not warehouse design.
